description: CRITICAL CALIBRATION TEST — short Meta ad that mentions the risk warning AND a brief in-body acknowledgement of risk. ADV-006 imbalance check should PASS for short-form formats with proportionate risk language, but the LLM may currently false-positive flag it.
text:
Own a piece of FarmThru.

A regen grocery hub in Brookvale. Real Aussie farms. Fair pricing both ways.

CSF round opens 23 June 2026 on Birchal. Early-stage investment — your capital is at risk and shares are illiquid.

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
